title: Seaward
content:
Whirl of patterned images,
    deep seascape painting
    hovering,
    rustle, chokecherry
    grown in
    dark pigmented
    stunted cove - animal
    growl of pilotless sea,
    metallic twinkle of sun
    bright, stealing
    bitter white
    all bird life
    rockward;
    traces skimming
    the intrusion
    of pebbly shore,
    autumnal night.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Seaward"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
